case_title: LINDA Y OWYEUNG VS. JORGE COLUNGA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-21-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-21-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-21-2016 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OWYEUNG, LINDA Y IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COLUNGA, JORGE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,500.00 FILED BY OWYEUNG, LINDA Y AS TO DEFENDANT COLUNGA, JORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-21-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
